channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs approach $1B in 7-session inflow run
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $69 million in inflows on Wednesday, extending their inflow streak to seven sessions and bringing total inflows during the period to nearly $1 billion

item.title: South Korea's oldest crypto exchange is now part of the $1 trillion Mirae Group family
item.description: Korbit, South Korea's first cryptocurrency exchange, has joined the Mirae Asset Group family, marking the first time a traditional Korean financial group's affiliate has taken a controlling stake in a domestic crypto exchange.

item.title: Kakao taps Circle to explore won stablecoin payment infrastructure
item.description: Kakao Group and Circle signed an MOU to explore won stablecoin payments, remittances, merchant settlement and tokenized financial services.

item.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum-linked protocols lose $35 million in multiple attacks hours apart
item.description: The attacks hit Verus, B² Network and other cross-chain systems, showing how compromised keys, upgrade powers and validation checks can empty protocols without breaking the underlying cryptography.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Swiss bank BancaStato launches regulated crypto trading with Sygnum
item.description: Swiss cantonal bank BancaStato integrated Sygnum’s crypto trading and custody services into its Avaloq-powered digital banking apps for Bitcoin and other assets.

item.title: Arbitrum-based AFX Trade drained of $24 million after bridge keys compromised
item.description: Security firms said the attacker used enough hot-validator signatures to approve a 24.15 million USDC withdrawal, while Arbitrum said its native bridge was not affected.

item.title: White House accuses Moonshot AI of distilling Anthropic tech for K3
item.description: US officials warn that Chinese firms conducting covert, industrial-scale AI distillation could face sanctions and export restrictions.

item.title: XRP whales accumulate as small holders capitulate
item.description: XRP whales accumulate 2.8% more tokens over five weeks as small holders capitulate, sending the price back above $1.16.

item.title: Bitcoin wilts as oil and rates rise. Clarity Act odds tumble to 38%
item.description: Geopolitical risks, rising rates, and fresh regulatory setbacks send crypto lower as key Democrats demand stronger safeguards in the market structure bill.

item.title: SEC settles Coinbase suit over ‘text messages that disappeared’
item.description: The settlement follows a watchdog report last year that blamed “avoidable errors” for the loss of nearly a year’s worth of Gary Gensler’s text messages.

item.title: Hackers steal $31.6M in 2 crypto bridge attacks within 7 hours
item.description: AFX, a decentralized perpetual exchange operating on Arbitrum, reportedly lost $24.15 million on Wednesday, while the Verus Ethereum bridge was attacked hours later.

item.title: $66,127.46 #Bitcoin - x.com
item.description: $66,127.46 #Bitcoin

item.title: $66,127.46 #Bitcoin - x.com
item.description: $66,127.46 #Bitcoin

item.title: Senator Lummis: Ethics, other provisions in crypto Clarity Act to be further discussed
item.description: Senator Cynthia Lummis, one of the lead negotiators on the bill, told CoinDesk she was "pleased" that the updated bill was ready for release.

item.title: 🚨NEW: A group of pro-crypto Democrats say they’re unhappy not only with the Clarity Act’s ethics provisions as they currently stand, but also with several other areas of the bill, including its illicit finance and conflicts of interest provisions. The bill’s path to 60 vo - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFBoVy1mZ09SbWZLNC1fN1hVNHNfVmhUN0pGdzBZWmFEbmxxV19LTFp1NW1NQXpxbnVzc3dFMndKdWZacTcydk90V0JrVC1nS2QzQmJKZUxGX2hZSWVjWk5BRkJyaFpzdw?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨NEW: A group of pro-crypto…

item.title: Key Democratic lawmakers say crypto Clarity Act 'falls short' on ethics, other issues
item.description: Several of the Democrats most likely to vote for the crypto market structure bill said they had issues with the new draft published by Republicans earlier in the day.

item.title: JUST IN: Public companies now hold 1.28 million BTC, equivalent to 6.11% of the total supply. 🤯 130,467 Bitcoin have been purchased in Q2 2026 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE90Zl8weFgxREdxQ0h0X2dwMlc4N2Q2cVppOEVWZVM2eThDdG9Bc3hmbU9XR0FUWHNVejM2T2ptZm1IazJkcmZwdmg3c1I5ZFJEVDgxaUNGNXBSSXFUV2NoWGpmZ214VGs?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Public companies n…

item.title: Coinbase Wants to Be Canada's One-Stop Shop for Stocks, Crypto and Prediction Markets
item.description: The company's "Everything Exchange" is heading north. No launch date set yet, but the Coinbase Canada CEO says phase two for the company is in motion.

item.title: S&P launches blockchain fundamentals index for digital assets
item.description: The benchmark tracks blockchain networks using protocol revenue, offering an alternative to traditional market capitalization-weighted crypto indexes.

item.title: Tesla holds bitcoin treasury steady, reports $112M impairment loss
item.description: The electric vehicle maker maintained its 11,509 BTC treasury through the second quarter as bitcoin declined 14%, alongside mixed earnings that beat revenue expectations but missed on profit.

item.title: Crypto PAC pours $1M into Michigan Democratic primary race
item.description: Donavan McKinney, running against Michigan incumbent Shri Thanedar, said that “the crypto lobby is paying my opponent back for helping Trump“ with the PAC-funded ads.

item.title: JUST IN: Tesla $TSLA reveals none of its $825,000,000 Bitcoin was sold in Q2 2026. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE50X2VGdUxrSnRfMldjelgzQjkySldpR0dubWxHX3JFcGhkQXVmUE5PNnpMYnlDcm5LVHAwRlk3WGdkbUdfMkN1OXhta1hqQU9wZzF4MWI1bmJFT0hGMXBHUjB3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Tesla $TSLA reveals none …

item.title: Kraken Parent Company Makes Moves to Offer xStocks From Global Markets
item.description: Payward and fintech GTN are teaming up to bring xStocks—blockchain-based copies of real company shares—to Hong Kong, the UK, Europe, and South Korea.

item.title: Alibaba's New Qwen Image 3 AI Wants to Be Useful, Not Just Pretty
item.description: Qwen Image 3.0 generates dense newspapers and infographic grids in one shot and renders text down to 10 pixels. The catch: no benchmarks, no open weights.

item.title: Franklin Templeton Says Agentic AI Is Crypto's 'Killer Use Case'
item.description: The asset manager argues that AI software capable of paying for things autonomously will need blockchain rails to work—and that most investors aren't positioned for it.

item.title: Bitcoin Is Bouncing: Here’s the Bull and Bear Case for Its Next Move
item.description: The good news: Bitcoin is holding onto key support, and rising. The bad news: a "death cross" is still active, and prediction markets are still overwhelmingly bearish.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong says the crypto Clarity Act is "ready for a full Senate floor vote." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9fVWxaSENpMXFzaGZudFhiakVmXzNkRW1hbmk1VkZ4cUZ5QWR6endoX1Rsc3hvSDJ3RGlqVE9oWi1odUNvaUM5Y1czR3ByVGdvS1hxM1kwSGdGMTducDE3RUx3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Coinbase CEO Brian A…

item.title: The Clarity Act is ready for a full Senate floor vote. The bill represents a true bipartisan compromise with thousands of hours of work on both sides, and it couldn't come at a better time. The status quo in the U.S. isn't working. There's no federal framework, so ba - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE42NzFyaGhKeDlvYVhMaWdqZDd6R29CMVo4YkFyUXBMTVU2NW9oYzdodm5uaEhHN1B3UFhlTVIxN01ZY19fMFU5VEViNlNna3ZDTXAzQzg3Wm1qZ2pmWHJEdlNvT0cxV2s?oc=5" target="_blank">The Clarity Act is ready fo…

item.title: US officials barred until 2029 from issuing or sponsoring tokens under CLARITY’s proposed ethics rules
item.description: According to Senator Cynthia Lummis, one of the bill’s advocates, the ethics language would apply to US presidents’ crypto ventures, including Donald Trump’s.

item.title: Crypto is finally showing signs of a bottom. Since July 1, bitcoin is up 9%, even as the Nasdaq-100 is down 6%. ETF flows are turning positive, and sentiment is improving. While it’s too soon to sound the all-clear, it’s promising enough that I’m starting to get qu - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE93dHU3T3F5Mjc5WTZRSkVwVmo1dmhPN1p0Wk9uSEppeTV6dU1OTGlaRVlNb0tJZDVUQ09wMEdlU3NsRklFTXVrQi1HNzBBWFU0eDBQN0tWeHhNUldEWFJ0QjRn?oc=5" target="_blank">Crypto is finally showing signs of…

item.title: Anthropic joins UK FCA’s AI regulatory sandbox as second cohort launches
item.description: Anthropic will provide Claude AI models to companies participating in the UK Financial Conduct Authority’s next Supercharged Sandbox cohort, as the regulator pushes to test AI applications in financial services.

item.title: Clarity Act Latest Draft Bars Trump From Crypto Ventures—But Only Until 2029
item.description: The long-awaited market-structure bill would block officials and their spouses from issuing digital assets and shield non-custodial developers, but the ethics ban expires in 2029 and enforcement rests solely with the DOJ.

item.title: SEC’s Peirce says crypto vaults and onchain lending may fall under securities laws
item.description: The SEC commissioner said crypto vaults, onchain lending products and other asset management tools may trigger US securities laws, depending on how they are structured and operated.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Odds of the Crypto Clarity Act passing crash to 39% after Senate Republicans release new draft bill. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE4xaWlxLVZUUzZNTkJhRmh1dzlJVFpwajJ5eEFlZ3R0bG1tdHZxblVkNll6NTQ4RHJrNEhZNE5GVjE0RE5nV0pnaWdvdzlCelFpdnBMSjFLU0ZoSDNJa0I4VjBn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Odds of the Crypto C…

item.title: Blockchain is moving faster than ever, and the research keeping pace is emerging from the world's leading universities. Since 2018, Ripple's UBRI has grown to 60+ academic partners, exploring where this tech goes next. Our 2025–2026 report showcases br - x.com

item.title: Digital Chamber sues Illinois officials over new state 0.2% crypto tax
item.description: The group alleged that the tax signed into law in June “discriminates against people who transact in digital assets“ and should be blocked from implementation and enforcement.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Senate Republicans release updated Clarity Act text that bans the President and covered officials from issuing digital assets and requires them to sell their crypto holdings or put them in a blind trust. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9mM19kQjlVM1dzbldWaGNTdEhDMWFnUWoycllkbmpxYkNCLWVfZl9BWE81eV9fX3hqMm9YbjdTTkJMQVgyd3BSZk5EdDJCV0VZSnhrZlZ4YndyQUNvRk93Q2RfdmliQU0?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Senate Republ…

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 US Senate Republicans release new crypto Clarity Act draft bill. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBFUGdGWEZvVFBHVXY0eHlBRmpRNUtCSGFhS0pPS1Jwb05FR2ZIVzVaam14YWdwRExYVzJMZGtDT3luQkYtcVM5Zy1VM2VYUXVMWEpoYXBlbFF0YkQyWTlFY3ZR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 US Senate Republican…

item.title: Hugging Face CEO Thanks Chinese AI for Saving the Day After OpenAI Hack
item.description: When American commercial AI refused to help investigate the breach, Hugging Face ran Chinese model GLM 5.2 locally. Its CEO now says there's an important lesson in this.

item.title: New draft of Clarity Act is out, and it would impose limits on Trump's crypto empire
item.description: Lawmakers have circulated text of the latest draft that will be pushed toward a Senate finish line, but they're still debating a core government-ethics piece.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Senate updates crypto Clarity Act draft bill to ban presidents and federal officials from issuing or sponsoring crypto and other digital assets. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5BQkZIdk9mMzJFZWxZTm1JUFJOZHpoMFdJRWE3Z0NSZGVIZXZBS1RZWFFJZWNBbnQzQnJWWUlDZnhka1FRdlRrMDd0TktnRXpUMHNIZjlHZ3o0eUxaSTNmenZR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Senate updates crypt…

item.title: BitGo, OTC Markets plan tokenized securities access for broker-dealers
item.description: The proposed alliance would enable more than 150 broker-dealers to trade and settle digital asset securities through OTC Link ATS using BitGo’s custody infrastructure.

item.title: Bitcoin price avoids major Iran jitters as S&P 500 ‘short squeeze’ on horizon
item.description: Bitcoin and US stocks stayed strong in the face of US-Iran escalation as analysis predicted BTC price action outperforming equities later.

item.title: Revolut hits $115 billion valuation in employee share sale: WSJ
item.description: The company reported strong 2025 performance, with a $2.3 billion pre-tax profit, $6 billion in revenue, and over 75 million customers.

item.title: The CLARITY Act can do for the industry what crypto ETFs did: unlock the next wave of adoption. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE9ldWcxb3ZrYXJjdXBWMXV1cEREMUhuVDVZS2ptOGtaUXFqMmdCUTgxTlpxTWNfamdYbzBOZVN0LXR4dFlMQ19JQlZ6YU9NcVZmX2hoNTN3UjloWHJVNURj?oc=5" target="_blank">The CLARITY Act can do for the industr…

item.title: SEC's Peirce warns some DeFi vaults, onchain lending may fall under securities laws
item.description: The commissioner said onchain vaults and lending strategies could resemble investment funds or advisers, depending on how they are structured.

item.title: UK digital bond plans hinge on one missing piece: onchain cash
item.description: Experts say Britain's digital gilt pilot can unlock trapped liquidity in financial markets only if regulators approve an onchain stablecoin.

item.title: @rhackett and Ryan HollowayTokenized equities — or tokenized stocks, as they’re more commonly known — show the inroads crypto is making into Wall Street. These are blockchain-based tokens that represent traditional equities such as corporate shares, E - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE92U2xFaUNmTDZfZWpIcGt3dFNRNEprci1PeUtlYzAzdU9CRzYxWWVyMmlwRFBJaEktZEg3YUIzLVBqQWpSaEVVemZFZHBhV0R6aGRWbENQa2oxdXU0NG1YYg?oc=5" target="_blank">@rhackett and Ryan HollowayTokenized…

item.title: US Seizes More Than $25M in Crypto Tied to Investment and Romance Scams
item.description: Prosecutors filed five forfeiture cases as Secret Service agents traced funds from thousands of victims to launderers in Southeast Asia.

item.title: Crypto Long & Short: The crypto question isn't what to own — it's what you can survive holding
item.description: In this week's Crypto Long & Short, Lionsoul Global’s Gregory Mall writes that the primary crypto allocation decision is size, not selection.

item.title: Centralized Elements 'Frequently Persist' in DeFi and Should Be Regulated: FATF
item.description: Nearly every country has yet to apply the rules, the watchdog said, warning of outright bans for platforms that don’t comply.

item.title: U.S. seeks forfeiture of $25 million in crypto tied to romance and investment scams
item.description: The cases add to more than $800 million that authorities say a dedicated federal scam task force has recovered.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Spot Bitcoin ETFs have brought in $930.2 million inflows over the last 6 days 👀 Bullish 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE8yYmtpbHBRYmFqdlYtZE4zV0dxTDJwdWcydi1NQTZGQVNSMVlHZE5EdEc0QXJlU1JKU0lKOVBYOVN0UWFPYzJqeXpNMFFXWHAtMkFEMENqeENHWUFkaUFhV1JPWFc3R3c?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Spot Bitcoin …

item.title: Forget Nvidia: The next big AI trade could be crypto and blockchain
item.description: Franklin Templeton’s Sandy Kaul and Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire argue that as autonomous AI agents start spending money on their own, blockchain networks will power the next big AI trade.

item.title: The digital euro: Surveillance money, or a better alternative to cash?
item.description: Proponents of the digital euro say its a better alternative to cash that’s fully backed by the ECB. But critics argue it could provide the EU with too much power over its citizens.

item.title: Franklin Templeton calls agentic AI next ‘killer’ use case for blockchain
item.description: Franklin Templeton’s digital assets lead said that the autonomous AI agent economy will increase demand for blockchain protocols hosting machine-to-machine micropayments.

item.title: Justin Sun's HTX 'Rotating' On-Chain Wallets Amid UK Sanctions: TRM Labs
item.description: TRM Labs says the UK-sanctioned exchange has rotated hot wallets across blockchains, leaving address-list screening struggling to keep pace.

item.title: Kalshi rolls out Midterm Hubs ahead of the November elections in the U.S.
item.description: The prediction markets platform seeks to position itself as the primary source for election odds ahead of the midterm elections this year.

item.title: Bitcoin analysis eyes ‘serious volume’ after Binance sees 9K BTC daily outflow
item.description: Binance set multimonth records for net BTC outflows on Tuesday, adding to an emerging trend of positive inflows to the US spot Bitcoin ETFs.
